name: cautilus
description: Standalone intentful behavior evaluation CLI and bundled skill.

interface.shortDescription: Intentful behavior evaluation with bounded review gates.
interface.longDescription: Install the Cautilus skill and workflow surface for adapter-driven baseline comparison, held-out validation, and bounded review variants.
defaultPrompt: Use Cautilus to evaluate the current change, workflow, or skill against an explicit baseline with held-out validation and bounded review variants.
